description: Configure bcWebCam so that only QR Code scanning is enabled, and all other barcode symbologies are disabled. Open bcWebCam's settings/options dialog, navigate to the barcode types section, and disable all 1D/linear barcodes (e.g., EAN, UPC, Code 128) as well as any other 2D barcodes (DataMatrix, PDF417, Aztec). Ensure QR Code is the ONLY enabled barcode type, apply the settings, and then take a screenshot showing your final barcode type configuration. Save this screenshot to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\qr_only_config.png using the Snipping Tool or Print Screen.
